text:
4 elements of a Threads account that runs itself:

1. Official Meta API — safe, built for this, zero ban risk.
2. Free tools only — GitHub Actions + free AI = $0/month.
3. Daily feedback loop — reads what works, writes better tomorrow.
4. Tokens auto-refresh — I haven’t logged in since setup day.

Two hours once. The system improves itself. You just watch.

Grab the blueprint (link in bio)
